senses.gloss: to rub with kohl (stibnite), to paint with kohl
to rub with kohl (stibnite), to paint with kohl
black coloring of the edges of the eyelids
darkened with kohl, dyed black (of the eyelids)

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Akkadian 𒎎𒋆𒁉𒍣𒁕 (guḫlum)bor.
Aramaic כוחלא (kuḥlā)bor.
Arabic كحل
Borrowed from Aramaic כוחלא / ܟܘܚܠܐ (kuḥlā), from Akkadian 𒎎𒋆𒁉𒍣𒁕 (guḫlum, “antimony, stibium”). Compare Hebrew כָּחָל (kakhál, “kohl”).
